meaning: British Board of Film Censors 英国电影审查局
examples: It was nice that David Cooke, the BBFC director, had said: "Glamorising smoking has been included as a classification issue in our published classification guidelines."
The UK Centre for Tobacco Control Studies has written to the British Board of Film Classification (BBFC) asking it to do just this to protect children from "particularly harmful imagery".
Last year the BBFC awarded the same rating to the Nemesis Sub-Terra ride at Alton Towers.
Alexis Camelon, the managing director of Pleasurewood Hills, said the BBFC rating would help "manage expectations" of visitors.
Previously, additional ratings were decided upon by the British Board of Film Classification (BBFC).
